title: ATTICUS_MPO packet-chain progress state after PR #100
content: The post-recovery implementation program remains governed by ORCH-20260411-010. ROADMAP.md still records Packet 011 and 012 as complete, Packet 013 as in progress, and Packets 014, 015, and 016 as queued. PR #99 and PR #100 improve the MPO memory-engine baseline on release-candidate, but they do not replace the governing packet chain; they land as compatible implementation progress on top of that program.
context_summary: Durable progress cell showing that the MPO packet-governance chain still governs after PR #100, while the memory-engine baseline has advanced through merged implementation work.
